tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/resolve resolves sibling source files across supported extensions
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/resolve falls back to index files when the base path is a directory
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/resolve returns null for bare module specifiers and unresolved relative paths
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/resolve resolves exact files before trying extension variants and index fallbacks
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/resolve resolves absolute import-like specifiers and ignores directories without index files
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/resolve resolves types from the current namespace, using namespaces, and fully qualified names
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/resolve ignores matches from the same file and resolves namespace-specific lookups
graphView/provider/webview/resolve resolves the graph view and clears it on dispose
graphView/provider/webview/resolve keeps a different timeline view attached when the graph view disposes
graphView/provider/webview/resolve resolves the timeline view independently
graphView/provider/webview/resolve keeps a different graph view attached when the timeline view disposes
graphView/provider/webview/resolve flushes pending refreshes when a resolved view becomes visible later
graphView/provider/webview/resolve does not flush pending refreshes when the timeline view becomes visible later
graphView/webview/resolve configures the webview, registers the message listener, and sets the initial visibility context
graphView/webview/resolve updates visibility context without triggering reload work when the view becomes visible again
graphView/webview/resolve updates visibility context while the view stays hidden
